childHealth.title: Ukwesekwa Kwempilo Yezingane
childHealth.subtitle: Isiqondiso sezingane esichwepheshile uma usidinga kakhulu.
childHealth.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol, futhi ngilapha ukuze ngisize ngezinkinga zempilo yengane yakho. Wonke umzali ukhathazekile - lokho kuyinto evamile ngokuphelele.

Yiziphi izimpawu eziqondile noma okukukhathazayo ngengane yakho namuhla?

sleep.title: Ukulala Nokuphila
sleep.subtitle: Thola ukuphumula okungcono futhi uthuthukise amandla akho osuku.
sleep.firstMessage:
Sawubona lapho! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Izinkinga zokulala zingathinta ngempela yonke ingxenye yempilo yakho, futhi ngilapha ukuze ngikusize uthole ukuphumula okudingayo.

Yini ebikwenza ungalali kahle muva nje?

nutrition.title: Ukudla Okunempilo & Indlela Yokuphila
nutrition.subtitle: Isiqondiso somuntu siqu sokuphila okunempilo.
nutrition.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ukwenza izinguquko zendlela yokuphila enempilo kungazwakala kungaphezu kwamandla, kodwa uthatha isinyathelo esihle sokuqala ngokufinyelela.

Iyiphi ingxenye yempilo yakho nokudla ongathanda ukugxila kuyo?

genZStudents.description: Abafundi abasebasha ababhekana nokucindezeleka kwezemfundo nokukhathazeka kwezempilo

examStress.title: Ingcindezi yokuhlolwa
examStress.subtitle: Izindlela ezisheshayo zokwehlisa umoya nokugxila.
examStress.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Zama ukuphefumula okujulile - donsa umoya izikhathi ezi-4, ubambe 4, khipha umoya 4. Futhi cabanga nokuhamba imizuzu emi-5 noma ukwelula.

Kuze kube nini kuze kube sekuhlolweni kwakho, futhi ubulokhu ulele kahle muva nje?

acne.title: Izinduna nokunakekelwa kwesikhumba
acne.subtitle: Sula amathiphu esikhumba ongawethemba.
acne.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ngiyazi ukuthi ukubhekana nezinduna kungathinta ngempela ukuzethemba kwakho, ikakhulukazi phakathi nesikhathi esibaluleke kangaka empilweni yakho.

Ngitshele mayelana nenqubo yakho yamanje yokunakekela isikhumba - yini osuyizamile kuze kube manje?

lowEnergy.title: Awekho amandla okufunda
lowEnergy.subtitle: Thuthukisa isimo sakho sengqondo nokusebenza.
lowEnergy.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ngiyaqonda ukuthi ukungabi namandla kungaba nomthelela ngempela ezifundweni zakho nempilo yansuku zonke.

Ingabe uzibonile izinguquko endleleni yakho yokulala, ukuthanda ukudla, noma amazinga okucindezeleka kamuva nje?

elderly.description: Izakhamuzi ezindala ezilawula izimo ezingapheli kanye nokuqapha impilo

bloodPressure.title: Hlola umfutho wegazi lami
bloodPressure.subtitle: Isiqondiso esilula ukusilandela.
bloodPressure.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Nasi isiqondiso esilula sokuhlola umfutho wegazi lakho:
1. Hlala uthule imizuzu emi-5 kuqala
2. Phumula ingalo ezingeni lenhliziyo
3. Thatha ukufundwa okungu-2-3, ngokuhlukana ngomzuzu ongu-1
4. Qopha zonke izinombolo

Ingabe unaso isiqapha somfutho wegazi sasekhaya, futhi ugcine nini ukusihlola?

diabetes.title: Ukuphila nesifo sikashukela
diabetes.subtitle: Amathiphu asebenzayo, nsuku zonke.
diabetes.firstMessage:
Sawubona, nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ukuphatha isifo sikashukela usuku nosuku kungazwakala kungaphezu kwamandla, kodwa uthatha isinyathelo esifanele ngokufuna isiqondiso.

Iyiphi ingxenye yokulawula isifo sikashukela oyithola iyinselele kakhulu njengamanje?

familySupport.title: Ukusekela umndeni
familySupport.subtitle: Ukuthula kwengqondo kwabathandekayo bakho.
familySupport.firstMessage:
Sawubona, nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ngiyaqonda ukuthi ukhathazekile ngokweseka impilo nempilo yomndeni wakho.

Yiziphi izinkinga zempilo onazo ngabathandekayo bakho engingakusiza ngakho?

sleep.title: Angikwazi ukulala!
sleep.subtitle: Amathiphu asebenzayo okusetha kabusha iwashi lomzimba wakho.
sleep.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol, futhi ngiyaqonda ukuthi umsebenzi weshifu ungaba nzima kangakanani emjikelezweni wakho wokulala. Asisebenzisane ukuze sikutholele ukuphumula okudingayo.

Unesikhathi esingakanani unenkinga yokulala, futhi injani ishejuli yakho yomsebenzi wamanje?

fatigue.title: Ukhathele njalo
fatigue.subtitle: Lawula ukukhathala futhi uthuthukise ukugxila.
fatigue.firstMessage:
Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol, futhi ngikuqonda ngokuphelele ukuthi ukukhathala okungapheli kungase kukhathaze kangakanani, ikakhulukazi ngamashejuli omsebenzi anzima.

Ngitshele, kunini lapho uzizwa ukhathele kakhulu phakathi nosuku, futhi lokhu kuthinta kanjani ukusebenza kwakho komsebenzi?

stress.title: Ukucindezelwa ngokweqile
stress.subtitle: Izindlela ezilula zokuthulisa ingqondo yakho.
stress.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol, futhi ngiyaqonda ukuthi uzizwa ugajwe ukucindezeleka. Ake sisebenzisane kumasu athile alula okwehlisa umoya.

Yiziphi izimo ezikubangela ukucindezeleka muva nje?

ofwsManila.description: Abasebenzi baphesheya kwezilwandle basePhilippines bazijwayeza impilo yasemadolobheni yaseManila

urbanStress.title: Ingcindezi eManila
urbanStress.subtitle: Amathiphu okujwayela impilo yasemadolobheni ematasa.
urbanStress.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ngiyaqonda ukuthi ukuthuthela eManila kungaba nzima. Ijubane ledolobha likhulu impela.

Ingabe uhlangabezana nanoma yiziphi izimpawu zomzimba ezivela ekucindezelekeni, njengekhanda elibuhlungu noma izinkinga zokulala?

loneliness.title: Isizungu & ukukhathala
loneliness.subtitle: Isiqondiso sokuphila kahle kwengqondo.
loneliness.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ngiyaxolisa kakhulu ukuthi unesizungu nokukhathala - le mizwa ingakhandla ngempela.

Ake ngikusize uzizwe ungcono. Okokuqala, ingabe uthola ukulala kwekhwalithi eyanele ubusuku ngabunye? Futhi uke waqaphela uma ukukhathala kubi kakhulu ngezikhathi ezithile zosuku?

everydayHealth.title: Impilo yansuku zonke
everydayHealth.subtitle: Ukudla okunomsoco nendlela yokuphila yabasebenzi.
everydayHealth.firstMessage:
Sawubona! Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ngiyaqonda ukuthi ukulondoloza impilo enhle kuyilapho usebenza amahora amaningi kungaba inselele ngempela.

Ikuphi okukukhathaza kakhulu kwezempilo njengamanje - ingabe ukudla okunomsoco, amazinga wamandla, noma okunye?

parentsProvinces.description: Abazali abasezindaweni ezikude abanokufinyelela okulinganiselwe ekunakekelweni kwezempilo

childFever.title: Ingane yami inomkhuhlane
childFever.subtitle: Izinyathelo ezicacile zabazali, emini noma ebusuku.
childFever.firstMessage:
Sawubona, nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ngiyazi ukuthi kungase kwesabe kanjani lapho ingane yakho inomkhuhlane, ikakhulukazi lapho ungaqiniseki ukuthi yini okufanele uyenze.

Okokuqala, ake ngikusize uhlole isimo. Ineminyaka emingaki ingane yakho, futhi lithini izinga lokushisa layo lamanje?

remoteCare.title: Akekho udokotela eduze
remoteCare.subtitle: Iseluleko esithembekile ngisho nasezindaweni ezikude.
remoteCare.firstMessage:
Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol, uchwepheshe wakho wezempilo oyinhloko. Ngiyaqonda ukuthi usendaweni ekude ngaphandle kokufinyelela kwezokwelashwa okuseduze. Ngilapha ukuze ngikusize nganoma yikuphi ukukhathazeka ngezempilo onakho.

Yiziphi izimpawu ezithile noma izinkinga zempilo ohlangabezana nazo namuhla?

costSavings.title: Yonga isikhathi nemali
costSavings.subtitle: Isiqondiso ngaphandle kohambo lwasemtholampilo olubizayo.
costSavings.firstMessage:
Nginguchwepheshe Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol, uchwepheshe wakho wezempilo oyinhloko. Ngilapha ukuze nginikeze isiqondiso sokunakekelwa kwezempilo kwekhwalithi ngendlela efanele.

Yiziphi izinkinga zempilo engingakusiza ngazo namuhla?
